scripts.lint:shell: files=$(fd -e sh -e bash --exclude node_modules --exclude .git --hidden 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -n "$files" ]; then echo "$files" | xargs shellcheck; fi
scripts.prepare: node -e "try{const cp=require('child_process');const hp=cp.execSync('git config --local --get core.hooksPath',{stdio:['ignore','pipe','ignore']}).toString().trim();const fs=require('fs');if(hp&&!fs.existsSync(hp)){cp.execSync('git config --local --unset-all core.hooksPath')}}catch{}" && (command -v pre-commit >/dev/null 2>&1 && pre-commit install || true)
scripts.quality: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm lint:md && pnpm lint:shell && pnpm test:install && pnpm test:urls && pnpm validate:refs && pnpm validate:skills
scripts.test: pnpm test:refs && pnpm test:install && pnpm test:urls && pnpm test:channels && pnpm lint && pnpm lint:md && pnpm format:check
